untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'limit bid' price level — not available in standard OHLC indicators; (2) counting consecutive limit-up days — requires custom session/bar state tracking not in allowed indicators; (3) 'positive expected value assessment' — subjective trade qualifier requiring external calculation or custom indicator. The position sizing rule (1/(1+0.25*consecutive_days)) requires dynamic position management logic outside condition evaluation.
translation_notes: Core reversion logic attempted with consecutive limit-up threshold, but foundational requirement (limit-up detection and consecutive bar counting) cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. This signal requires: (a) custom indicator to identify limit-up/limit-down moves relative to daily limit price, (b) state machine to track consecutive occurrences, (c) expected value weighting module. Author reference to 'ten days in a row' confirms pattern dependency is critical to signal intent.
